summary: Reposted Fox News segment. A man in a suit and a young woman stand together at a press event holding framed photographs; other attendees behind them also hold photos. A lower-third reads 'THOMAS GORMAN | SHERIDAN GORMAN'S FATHER' and 'SHERIDAN GORMAN'S FATHER: THIS IS A FAILURE,' with a 'CHICAGO' tag and a JD Vance promo box. The audio is the man speaking about his daughter's death. The tweet text says he is calling out open-border and sanctuary policies.

script.scene: A man in a suit and a young woman hold framed photographs at a press event with others behind them; chyron 'THOMAS GORMAN | SHERIDAN GORMAN'S FATHER / THIS IS A FAILURE.'
